hafp_research_age_1_traditions_custom = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_legionaries_1_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_africa
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_anatolia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_carpathia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caucasus_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_crescent_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_egypt_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_france_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_britain_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_iberia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_italy_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_maghreb_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_german_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
					has_or_had_tag = ROM
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = unlock_legionaries_1_advance
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_legionaries_1_advance
	}

		limit = {

					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_america
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_alaska_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_aridoamerica_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_canada_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caribbean_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_central_america_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_east_coast_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_plains_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_mesoamerica_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_west_coast_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_xalisco_area
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_zacatecas_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					is_capital_in_south_america = yes
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = mountain_roads
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:mountain_roads
	}

			NOT = { has_advance = the_pentarchy }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_orthodox
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion = religion:orthodox
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = the_pentarchy
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:the_pentarchy
	}

hafp_research_age_2_renaissance_custom = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_legionaries_2_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_africa
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia

					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_maghreb_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_german_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
					has_or_had_tag = ROM
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = unlock_legionaries_2_advance
			}
		}

			NOT = { has_advance = congregation_of_merchants }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_indochina_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = MLC
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = congregation_of_merchants
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:congregation_of_merchants
	}

					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_east_coast_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					exists = capital
					OR = {
					original_capital.region = region:east_coast_region
					original_capital.region = region:canada_region
					}
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = stickball_game
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:stickball_game

			NOT = { has_advance = border_raiders }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_america
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_alaska_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_aridoamerica_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_canada_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caribbean_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_central_america_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_east_coast_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_plains_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_mesoamerica_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_west_coast_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_xalisco_area
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_zacatecas_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					is_capital_in_south_america = yes
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = border_raiders
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:border_raiders
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = sutra }

				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2

					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_buddhist
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					religion.group = religion_group:buddhist
					religion.group = religion_group:dharmic
					}
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = sutra
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:sutra

					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_orthodox
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion = religion:orthodox
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = church_guidance
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:church_guidance

hafp_research_age_4_reformation_custom = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_legionaries_4_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_africa
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_anatolia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_carpathia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caucasus_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_crescent_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_egypt_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_france_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_britain_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_iberia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_italy_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_maghreb_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_german_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
					has_or_had_tag = ROM
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = unlock_legionaries_4_advance
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_legionaries_4_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_varangians_4_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_thrace_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = BYZ
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = unlock_varangians_4_advance
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_varangians_4_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_byzantine_cataphracts_4_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_anatolia_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
					culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:greek_group }
					}

					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_persia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_china_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_tibet_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_west_china_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_western_india_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_xinjiang_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_eastern_khorasan_area
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_western_khorasan_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					religion = religion:mahayana
					religion = religion:sanjiao
					}
					any_international_organizations_member_of = {
					OR = {
					international_organization_has_policy = policy:confucianism_policy
					international_organization_has_policy = policy:daoism_policy
					}
					}
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = three_teachings
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:three_teachings

					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_orthodox
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion = religion:orthodox
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = oktoechos
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:oktoechos

			NOT = { has_advance = thp_princeps_albaniae }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_culture_albanian
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = THP
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = thp_princeps_albaniae
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:thp_princeps_albaniae
	}

					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_orthodox
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion = religion:orthodox
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = legacy_of_saint_andrew
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:legacy_of_saint_andrew

					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2

					}

					culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:jurchen_group }

					has_or_had_tag = CHI
					OR = {
					government_type = government_type:tribe

					}
					}

					}

	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = caliphate }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_6_revolutions
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_muslim
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion.group = religion_group:muslim
					NOT = { religion = religion:ibadi }
					}
					}
				}
				can_research_advance = caliphate
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:caliphate

	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_generic = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_custom = yes
}

hafp_research_no_age_generic = {
}

hafp_research_no_age_custom = {
}

hafp_research_no_age = {
	hafp_research_no_age_generic = yes
	hafp_research_no_age_custom = yes
}

hafp_research_custom = {
	hafp_research_age_1_traditions_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_2_renaissance_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_3_discovery_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_4_reformation_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_5_absolutism_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_custom = yes
	hafp_research_no_age_custom = yes
}

hafp_research_all = {
	hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = yes
	hafp_research_no_age = yes
}

hafp_research_current_era = {
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_1_traditions }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_2_renaissance }
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_3_discovery }
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_4_reformation }
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_5_absolutism }
		hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_6_revolutions }
		hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = yes
	}
}

hafp_research_previous_eras = {
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_2_renaissance }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_3_discovery }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_4_reformation }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_5_absolutism }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_6_revolutions }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
		hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	}
}
